name: Crisp Bacon Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Sauté the bacon until crisp, then chop it finely.
2. Sift together the flour, sugar, salt, and baking powder.
3. Add the chopped bacon to the dry ingredients.
4. In a separate bowl, beat the egg, mix with milk, and incorporate the bacon fat.
5. Pour the wet mixture into buttered muffin tins, filling each about one-third full.
6. Bake in a hot oven (425°F) for 15-20 minutes.
